subcodes.first_line: O seekers of the Divine Kingdom! Happy art thou that have turned to God and have raised thy sight from this material world to the realm above.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاقان ملکوت الله خوشا بحال شما که توجه بخدا نموده اید و نظر را از عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcending the material condition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
